Ultra Sun/Ultra Moon Island Kahunas & Elite Four

	As remakes, Pokémon Ultra Sun & Ultra Moon repeat the new Island Trials system of Sun & Moon. They consist of various quests, overseen by a Trial Captain, who specializes in a certain type (though you do not battle them like gym leaders during the trial). At the end of each island you must battle the Island Kahuna, then after completing all the Island Trials you take on the Elite Four. Their teams are all shown below.

As part of Mina's island trial, some of the Trial Captains must be sought out and battled. They can be found in these locations:

	Ilima: Hau'oli Cemetery
	Lana: Lush Jungle (Ultra Moon only)
	Mallow: Lush Jungle (Ultra Sun only)
	Kiawe: Wela Volcano Park
	Sophocles: Hokulani Observatory
	Nanu: Aether House
	Mina: Seafolk Village

After beating the Pokémon League, the trial captains may be battled again, with higher level teams. They are to be found at certain locations, and then battled in the home towns.

	Ilima: find at the Trainers' School on Route 1
	Lana: find and defeat her sisters in Konikoni City
	Kiawe: find at Paniola Town (Pokémon Ultra Sun only)
	Mallow: find at Konikoni City restaurant, daytime (Pokémon Ultra Moon only)
	Sophocles: Pokémon League Challenger, post-game
	Acerola: Pokémon League Elite Four

### Island Kahunas
[Hala](#kahuna-1)[Olivia](#kahuna-2)[Nanu](#kahuna-3)[Hapu](#kahuna-4)
### Elite Four
[Molayne](#elite4-1)[Olivia](#elite4-2)[Acerola](#elite4-3)[Kahili](#elite4-4)[Hau](#champion-5)
